final:
module top_module(input [7:0] operand1, input [7:0] b, input [2:0] op, output reg [15:0] res);always @(*) begin
        case(op)
            3'b000: res = operand1 + b; // Addition
            3'b001: res = operand1 - b; // Subtraction
            3'b010: res = operand1 * b; // Multiplication
            3'b011: res = operand1 / b; // Division
            default: res = 16'b0; // Default value
        endcase
    end

endmodule
